text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You've been doing great lately, Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It seems as though you and your trainer have
gotten really in sync with each other.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I-I wouldn't go so far as to say that! Though I
guess training has been going well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I guess she is always adjusting my training regimen to suit my needs and encouraging me when I don't feel confident...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Maybe I should put my gratitude into words...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I-I was just thinking about how well things have
been going recently...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It... it feels like my training is starting to pay off,
maybe. And I, um, think my regimen has been...
good for me.
choice_data_list: It's because you're working so hard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I know you have a lot to do with all that, so... I
just wanted to say thank you.
choice_data_list: It's because you're working so hard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Of course I'm working hard! Anyway, um... Bye!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I hope we can keep it up, and, um... Anyway, I'm
going to go for a run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Dober turns bright red and runs away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Dober turns bright red and runs away.
